gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (68/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (68/ 8)
text: مَا مِنْ عِبَادَةٍ أَفْضَلَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ مِنْ عِفَّةِ بَطْنٍ وَ فَرْجٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Mansour Bin Hazim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is none from a ‘worship’ more superior in the Presence of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> than the chastity of the belly and the private part’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Sayf ibn ‘Amirah from Mansur ibn Hazim from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘In the sight of Allah there is no worship more virtuous than chastity in matters of stomach and genital organs.’”
